name: frontend-vibe-suite
description: A multimodal frontend development plugin that turns style interviews into Wan design videos, translates them with Qwen Omni, and routes implementation toward the right framework, component library, or Web Components stack.

interface.shortDescription: Run a multimodal frontend loop from style interview to design video to routed implementation handoff
interface.longDescription: Use Frontend Vibe Suite to interview for style intent, capture stack and component preferences, generate Wan2.7 concept assets and showcase videos, translate those videos into structured frontend briefs with Qwen Omni, route the work to the right component family or Web Components stack, and then continue implementation with existing frontend coding workflows.
defaultPrompt: Run a frontend vibe loop from requirements to a design video and implementation brief
Interview me for product style and generate a Wan2.7 prototype video
Translate this UI design video into a structured frontend brief
Route my app to the right Vue, Svelte, Angular, Solid, or Web Components library
Choose between framework-native suites, headless primitives, and Web Components
